violations.text: Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The walk-in cooler was observed blowing warm air and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, service call has been made. Establishment is to send proof of repair to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The floor under the candy isle shelving area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The snack isle bottom shelve has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

The walk-in cooler was observed blowing warm air and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, service call has been made. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 door reach-in grates and the snack isle shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

The floor under the candy isle shelving area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

Various food in the walk-in cooler was observed held between 55-57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All TCS foods out of temperature control were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection (see attached disposal). Various food that was delivered yesterday was observed between 39-40 DF and was moved to properly functioning refrigeration at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in walk-in cooler until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, a service call has been made. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
Various food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 55 DF. Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 door reach-in grates and the snack isle shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

The floor under the candy isle shelving area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
An unfinished wood shim was observed under the women's room toilet. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
